TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Pranab_Mukherjee, title = Pranab_Mukherjee, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pranab_Mukherjee} }

S.FORM: Pranab Mukherjee ryax sa tay 11 nqu tay 12, Pranab Mukherjee, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1935) mrhuw India ta' misuw hya' ga Pranab Mukherjee, aring ryax tay 25 squ byacing tay 7 sa kawas 2012 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

Pranab Mukherjee ryax sa tay 11 nqu tay 12, Pranab Mukherjee, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1935) mrhuw India ta' misuw hya' ga Pranab Mukherjee, aring ryax tay 25 squ byacing tay 7 sa kawas 2012 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: pranaβ mukħerjee rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, pranaβ mukħerjee, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw in*ia taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa pranaβ mukħerjee, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
